# Signal Gate Model

Every video must pass gates.

```text
Gate 1: Eligibility
Gate 2: Classification
Gate 3: Scroll stop
Gate 4: Early hold
Gate 5: Body retention
Gate 6: Completion / rewatch
Gate 7: Save / send / comment / follow
Gate 8: Search / long-tail discovery
Gate 9: Trust / repeat audience
```

## Gate map

| Gate | Viewer behaviour | Primary metric | Creative tactics |
|---|---|---|---|
| Classification | “What is this?” | search traffic, topic relevance | keyword hook, aligned caption, niche language |
| Scroll stop | “Should I swipe?” | chose-to-view, 1–3s retention | first frame, contrast, motion, face, result-first |
| Early hold | “Why keep watching?” | 3–5s retention | tension hook, information gap, problem framing |
| Body retention | “Is this still worth it?” | avg watch, avg % viewed | story beats, proof, visual resets, first payoff |
| Completion | “Do I need the ending?” | completion, replay | reveal, transformation, open-loop closure |
| Save | “Will I need this later?” | saves per reach | checklist, template, framework, steps |
| Send/share | “Who needs this?” | sends/shares per reach | identity, warning, social target, emotion |
| Comment | “Do I need to respond?” | comments per reach | binary prompt, disagreement, personal relevance |
| Follow | “Will this account keep giving value?” | follows per 1,000 views | series, authority, proof, consistent niche |
| Search | “Can this answer a query later?” | 7–30d views, search terms | exact problem phrasing, searchable title/caption |

## Diagnosis principles

```text
Low shown / low impressions:
    topic unclear, eligibility issue, account inconsistency, weak initial test.

High shown but low chose-to-view:
    first frame failed.

Good chose-to-view but weak 3s retention:
    hook failed or opening promise unclear.

Good early retention but poor completion:
    body too slow, payoff too late, too much setup.

Good completion but low saves:
    interesting but not reusable.

Good completion but low sends:
    useful but not socially targeted.

High comments but low retention:
    provocative but not watchable.

High saves but low follows:
    useful video, unclear account promise.

High views but weak follows:
    broad/trendy topic not connected to account identity.

Good search traffic but weak feed:
    good topic, weak packaging/hook.

Good feed spike but no long tail:
    trend or emotion worked, search value weak.
```
